name: STRATEGIC ACQUISITIONS INC /NV/
summary: Strategic Acquisitions, Inc. is a Nevada-incorporated private lending company providing U.S. Dollar-denominated loans collateralized by digital assets, primarily Bitcoin. The company serves small businesses and individuals in Asia and Europe with term loans ranging from $500,000 to $5,000,000 and durations of 3 to 36 months. As of July 2024, all outstanding loans were repaid and lending operations were temporarily ceased. The company generates revenue from interest income and loan origination fees.

products.name: Digital Asset-Backed Loans
products.description: U.S. Dollar-denominated term loans collateralized by Bitcoin, offered to small businesses and individuals in Asia and Europe, ranging from $500,000 to $5,000,000.

products.name: Loan Administration Services
products.description: Loan administration services initiated during 2023 and subsequently ceased.

products.name: Proprietary Software Technology Platform
products.description: Planned platform to originate and service digital asset-backed loans; development not yet begun as of December 31, 2025 due to lack of funding.

partnerships.description: South Dakota public trust company providing crypto custody services to hold digital assets as collateral; service terminated July 2024.
Co-owner of Exworth Union and major shareholder of Strategic Acquisitions; key party in the 2022 Merger Agreement.

partnerships.partner_name: World Class Global Technology PTE LTD
partnerships.description: Co-owner of Exworth Union and stockholder party to the 2022 Merger Agreement.
